title: Periscope antenna
content: In telecommunication, a periscope antenna is an antenna configuration in which the transmitting antenna is oriented to produce a vertical radiation pattern, and a flat or off-axis parabolic reflector, mounted above the transmitting antenna, is used to direct the beam in a horizontal path toward the receiving antenna. A periscope antenna facilitates increased terrain clearance without long transmission line s, while permitting the active equipment to be located at or near ground level for ease of maintenance.
